use_cases: Displaying temporary success messages after user actions like form submissions or API calls
Showing error notifications when operations fail or validation errors occur
Providing warning alerts for potentially risky user actions
Delivering informational messages or system status updates to users
Confirming data changes with auto-dismissing toast notifications
ai_summary: A React toast notification system with context-based architecture supporting multiple toast types (success, error, warning, info) and 5 position options. Features auto-dismiss after 5 seconds, framer-motion animations, and a custom useToast hook for easy integration. Includes a provider component that renders multiple toast containers and manages toast state globally through React context.
